(c) 2008-2013, holger krekel
XSpecaG
Execution Specification: key1=value1//key2=value2 ...
    * keys need to be unique within the specification scope
    * neither key nor value are allowed to contain "//"
    * keys are not allowed to contain "="
    * keys are not allowed to start with underscore
    * if no "=value" is given, assume a boolean True value
    Nc
%r not a valid XSpec keyz
duplicate key: {!r} in {!r}z
env:
_spec
split
find
AttributeError
__dict__
ValueError
format
startswith
setattr)
self
stringZ
keyvalue
value
1/usr/lib/python3.9/site-packages/execnet/xspec.py
__init__
XSpec.__init__c
namer
__getattr__'
XSpec.__getattr__c
<XSpec {!r}>)
__repr__,
XSpec.__repr__c
__str__/
XSpec.__str__c
hashr
__hash__2
XSpec.__hash__c
getattr
otherr
__eq__5
XSpec.__eq__c
__ne__8
XSpec.__ne__c
popen
chdirr
_samefilesystem;
XSpec._samefilesystem)
__name__
__module__
__qualname__
__doc__r)
sshZ
socketZ
pythonr*
nice
dont_write_bytecodeZ	execmodelr
<module>
